creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
So we should switch to the prefered way of freetype itself? 

Just 2 questions:
1. Shouldn't this also be ported into PHP itself? Patching always introduces effort and it seems that your patch just does the right think. So should this not be the default in upstream?

2. Is PHP 7.4 and PHP 8.0 also effected? If so, can you please provide a patch (here in the issue)

Thanks! :)
